creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
testbuild on 14.1-amd64 with libreoffice-24.2.5.2 and TEST=on was successful. But I guess it's a no-op, as the logfile is very similar in length compared to TEST=off.

https://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/libreoffice-without-TEST.txt

https://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/libreoffice-with-TEST.txt
